description: '''Emo rap''' (also known as '''emo hip hop''' or '''sad rap''') is a [[subgenre]] of [[Hip hop music|hip hop]] influenced by [[emo]]. It emerged during the early-2010s through the [[SoundCloud rap]] scene, and fuses [[Trap music]]-style beats with sung vocals. Originally pioneered by artists such as [[Black Kray]]'s [[Goth Money Records]], [[Bones (rapper)|Bones]] and [[GothBoiClique]] members [[Wicca Phase Springs Eternal]], [[Lil Tracy]] and [[Lil Peep]]. The genre was popularized in the mainstream by Lil Peep, [[Trippie Redd]], [[$uicideboy$]], [[XXXTentacion]], and [[Juice Wrld]].
